scripts.mongo:rs: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path mongo-data | Out-Null; & 'C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.3\bin\mongod.exe' --dbpath mongo-data --replSet rs0 --port 27018 --bind_ip 127.0.0.1"
scripts.mongo:init: mongosh mongodb://127.0.0.1:27018/admin --eval "try { rs.status().ok } catch (err) { rs.initiate({_id: 'rs0', members: [{ _id: 0, host: '127.0.0.1:27018' }]}) }"
